description: Retrieve “no input” value for integers and reals. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. idef,rdef = getbatdefaults()

return_values.name: idef
return_values.description: Default integer value used in the batch command processor. (output).

return_values.name: rdef
return_values.description: Default real value used in the batch command processor. (output).
